id.description: Stable identifier for this portable OACS record.

operation.description: Standard operation name represented by this envelope.

status.description: Lifecycle status for this record in the portable OACS model.

actor_id.description: Optional actor identifier associated with this operation or projection.

agent_id.description: Optional agent identifier associated with this operation or projection.

capsule_id.description: Optional ContextCapsule identifier associated with this context operation.

scope.description: Portable scope labels that constrain where the record applies.

token_budget.description: Token budget requested or used by this context operation.

arguments.description: Portable operation arguments; implementations may map them to local APIs.

result.description: Portable operation result envelope; implementations may include adapter-neutral details.

audit_event_id.description: AuditEvent identifier associated with this operation.

created_at.description: Creation timestamp encoded as a portable string.
